text.title: agile-ceremonies-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agile-ceremonies-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Ceremony rituals re-imported when a team has moved to flow-based delivery.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Sprint cadence imposed on a Kanban team adds overhead without benefit; the team "does Scrum ceremonies for Kanban" and cargo-cults both methods badly.
